title: Flatten streams instead of nesting subscribes
description: Use switchMap/mergeMap/concatMap to chain dependent observables rather than subscribing inside a subscribe.
body: Use when one stream's value drives another async call (a typeahead query feeding a search request). Do not subscribe inside another subscribe. Actions: pipe the source through a flattening operator, choosing switchMap to cancel the prior inner stream (search/typeahead), concatMap to queue in order, mergeMap for concurrency, or exhaustMap to ignore while busy (submit). Validation signals include a marble or TestBed test proving stale inner requests are cancelled with switchMap. Risk boundary: nested subscribes lose cancellation and ordering, producing race conditions where an older response overwrites a newer one; pick the operator deliberately for the concurrency semantics you need.
